criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence technologies to enhance user experience, such as personalized recommendations, chatbots, and visual search.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, user reviews, developer documentation.

criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user rating of the app on major app stores, reflecting overall user satisfaction.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store ratings.

criteria.name: Download Volume
criteria.description: Total number of downloads, indicating the app's popularity and user base size.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store download statistics.

criteria.name: Feature Richness
criteria.description: The variety and usefulness of features offered by the app, including AI-driven functionalities.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, and developer documentation.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated, reflecting ongoing development and responsiveness to user feedback.
criteria.sources: App update history on app stores.
